heading: Overview
body:
Some Atlas features, including [federated database instances](atlas-data-federation) and [Amazon Web Services Key Management Service](security-aws-kms), authenticate with AWS (Amazon Web Services) [IAM roles](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/id_roles_use.html).
When Atlas accesses AWS (Amazon Web Services) services,
[assumes an IAM role](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/id_roles_manage-assume.html).

You can set up an assumed IAM role for your Atlas account to use
with the Atlas Administration API or Atlas UI if you have the
[Project Owner](<Project Owner>) role. Atlas supports unified access only
for AWS (Amazon Web Services).
